products.title: Brass Wu Lou (Calabash)
products.subtitle: Health & Protection
products.description: Traditional Feng Shui cure for illness and negative energy. The Wu Lou absorbs sickness chi and transforms it into healing energy. Handcrafted from solid brass with intricate engravings.

products.title: Obsidian Pixiu Bracelet
products.subtitle: Wealth & Protection
products.description: The legendary wealth beast Pixiu paired with protective black obsidian. Attracts wealth while shielding from negative energy. Adjustable elastic band fits most wrists.

products.title: Bagua Mirror Set (3pc)
products.subtitle: Space Protection
products.description: Complete set of flat, convex, and concave Bagua mirrors. Essential for exterior Feng Shui protection against sha chi. Each mirror serves a specific protective purpose.

products.title: Five Elements Crystal Grid
products.subtitle: Energy Balance
products.description: Curated crystal set representing Wood (Green Aventurine), Fire (Carnelian), Earth (Yellow Jasper), Metal (Clear Quartz), Water (Sodalite). Perfect for meditation spaces and energy alignment.

products.title: Rose Quartz Mandarin Ducks
products.subtitle: Love & Relationships
products.description: Pair of mandarin ducks carved from rose quartz, the stone of unconditional love. Place in the southwest corner for relationship harmony. Comes with placement guide.

products.title: Brass Money Frog (Three-Legged Toad)
products.subtitle: Wealth Attraction
products.description: The legendary Jin Chan sits upon coins, holding one in its mouth. Place facing inward near your front door to attract wealth. Made from brass with gold finish.

products.title: Bamboo Wind Chime (8 Rods)
products.subtitle: Harmony & Balance
products.description: Eight bamboo rods produce soothing tones that activate positive chi flow. Hang near windows or doors for gentle energy circulation. Sustainably sourced bamboo.

products.title: Five Emperor Coins Set
products.subtitle: Wealth & History
products.description: Replica coins from five powerful Qing Dynasty emperors. String together and place under doormat or in wealth corner. Brass alloy with authentic patina finish.

products.title: Selenite Wand Set
products.subtitle: Protection & Cleansing
products.description: High-vibration selenite wands for space cleansing and energy clearing. Use to cleanse other crystals and create protective barriers. Set of 3 wands.

products.title: Ammonite Fossil Display
products.subtitle: Ancient Wealth Energy
products.description: Ancient ammonite fossil with natural golden ratio spiral. Represents millions of years of earth energy and continuous prosperity. From Madagascar.

products.title: Red String Protection Bracelet
products.subtitle: Simple Protection
products.description: Simple yet powerful red string bracelet blessed with protective intention. Worn on left wrist to ward off negative energy. Hand-tied with intention.

products.title: Lucky Bamboo (3 Stalks)
products.subtitle: Living Wealth Energy
products.description: Three stalks represent happiness, long life, and prosperity. Easy-care indoor plant that brings vibrant wood element energy. Includes ceramic pot.
